titleStmt.title: Letter from H A Thomas to Nicolas Lamb, 23 November 1915
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: H A Thomas

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: A letter from H A Thomas to Nicholas Lamb concerning the cost of restoring street lamps and supplying them with gas. Nicholas Lamb (b. 1861) was the Town Clerk of Longford and served on the Longford Urban District Council. The Longford Urban District Council was the towns local authority and was renamed the Longford Town Council in 2002. H. A. Thomas worked in the Longford Gas Works.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
erection of new lamp Longford Gas Works
23.Nov.1915 Dear Sir With reference to your instructions
re fixing lamp in lane leading from New St
to Dublin Street, I beg to inform you that the cost
of running for supply to the position and fixing
lantern complete would be £6— I would propose running the supply from
Dublin Street to the position as I find this would
be the shortest route and the least expensive Providing your Council accepts my estimate
I would feel obliged if they would grant me a
little time to carry out the work as I would find
it very difficult to obtain the necessary piping in
a hurry besides I am particularly busy at
present. Yours Ffy
H.A. Thomas N Lamb
Town Clerk
Longford
